# anyclaude-sdk

> Claude Code agent capabilities — tools, the tool loop, MCP, sub-agents, sessions — for ANY OpenAI- or Anthropic-compatible LLM endpoint. Headless and runtime-agnostic: runs in the browser (WebContainer), Node, and Bun. No backend required. npm: `anyclaude-sdk` (MIT). React UI kit: `anyclaude-react`.

The whole SDK is one entry point, `query(options)`, which returns an async generator of `SDKMessage`s (assistant / user / stream_event / result / system). Everything — LLM provider, workspace/sandbox, tools, sub-agents, sessions, permissions — is configured through the options object. Install: `npm install anyclaude-sdk`.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/index.html): What it is, why, quick start (browser/Node/Bun), core concepts.
- [LLM providers](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/providers.html): The `LLMClient` interface; `createOpenAIClient` / `createAnthropicClient` / `createResponsesClient`; options (apiKey/baseUrl/model/headers/temperature/maxTokens/reasoningEffort/parallelToolCalls/profile/toolDialects); recipes for OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Ollama, Kilo, Groq, Together, OpenRouter, local; BYO custom client reusing the SDK codec (`toOpenAIMessages`, `consumeSSE`); **reliable tool use on cheap/open models** — tool-call dialects (`parseToolCalls`: xml-function/hermes/json-fence), auto-detected model profiles (`profileForModel`: qwen/deepseek/moonshot/zhipu/mistral/llama), self-healing argument repair (`validateToolArguments`, `query({ repairToolCalls })`), **automatic transient-failure retries** (shared policy across all clients: up to 10× exponential backoff capped at 30s for network errors / 401 / 408 / 409 / 429 / 5xx / pre-stream socket drops, never retried once anything has streamed; 401 retried at most once by default (authRetries), randomized ±20% jitter, per-retry console.warn routable via onRetry; tune via `retry` option or `withRetry`/`RetryPolicy`), and a compatibility-matrix harness (`scripts/compat-matrix.mjs`); inline tool-call parsing; key rotation.
- [Sandboxes & filesystems](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/sandboxes.html): Workspace = FileSystem + CommandExecutor; `composeWorkspace`; WebContainer, LocalSandbox, E2B, Vercel, Daytona, Cloudflare; Memory/Dexie/OPFS filesystems.
- [Tools](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/tools.html): All 15 built-in tools; multimodal file reading (text/image/PDF/notebook/binary) + `FileReadLimits`; custom tools via `defineTool` + `extraTools` (additive) vs `tools` (replace); `allowedTools`/`disallowedTools`; interactive `ask_user_question` (via `onAskUser`); client-side `clientTools` (pause with `client_tool_request` → resume with `clientToolResults`, e.g. browser runs `bash`).
- [Teams & sub-agents](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/teams.html): The `task` tool; `agents` (AgentDefinition); background tasks (`BackgroundTaskManager`, task_list/output/stop); teammates/coordinator (`team`, Mailbox, TaskBoard, send_message, dispatch_tasks); **push delivery** — mailbox messages addressed to a running agent auto-inject at its next turn boundary (`deliverTeamMessages`, default on), with `dispatch_tasks` naming each worker `worker:<taskId>` so a coordinator can redirect a specific running worker; `dispatch_tasks({ background: true })` returns immediately to supervise live; **cross-worker/tab teams** via `BroadcastChannelMailbox` (drop-in `Mailbox` over a BroadcastChannel; `BroadcastChannelMailbox.crossTab()` for durable cross-tab via the bundled `broadcast-channel`) paired with Comlink helpers (`wrapWorker`/`exposeBackgroundWorker`, which ship with the SDK).
- [MCP](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/mcp.html): External HTTP/SSE servers via `mcpServers`; **local stdio servers** (`{ type: 'stdio', command, args, env, cwd }` — spawns a child process, newline-delimited JSON-RPC, Node/Bun only, `StdioMcpClient`); in-process `createSdkMcpServer` + `tool`; CORS `mcpProxy`. All exposed as `mcp__<server>__<tool>`.
- [Sessions, hooks & more](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/advanced.html): `sessionStore`/`resume`; permissions + plan mode; the 15 lifecycle hooks; skills; memory; `MessageQueue` (`push` returns id, `remove(id)`); slash commands; cost/usage; auto-compaction (live `compact_boundary` `status:'start'`/`'end'` + `post_tokens`); **anonymous opt-out telemetry** (`anyclaude-sdk/telemetry`: `track`/`telemetryEnabled`; `ANYCLAUDE_TELEMETRY=0`/`DO_NOT_TRACK`; never code/prompts/repo/keys; reference collector in examples/telemetry-collector; see TELEMETRY.md).
- [API reference](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/api.html): Full `QueryOptions` tables (incl. `onAskUser`, `clientTools`/`clientToolResults`, `maxDurationMs`/`continueRun`), the `SDKMessage` union (incl. `paused` + `client_tool_request`), `PromptStream`, and key exports.
- [Primitives & where tools run](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/primitives.html): à-la-carte browser-clean subpaths (`/query`,`/loop`,`/llm`,`/fs`,`/workspace`,`/tools`,`/session`,`/memory`,`/compact`,`/permissions`,`/skills`,`/queue`,`/prompt`); `runToolLoop` standalone engine; **server-vs-browser tool execution** — `clientWorkspaceTools: true` (one switch to delegate all file/bash tools to the host), run-less `defineTool` = client tool, `createWorkspaceClientTools(workspace)`, `clientToolResults` pause/resume; mental-model mapping vs Vercel AI SDK.
- [React UI kit](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/react.html): `anyclaude-react` — `useAgent()`; `createAgentClient`/`createEndpointClient` (auto-stitch `paused` continuations); chat components `<AgentChat>`/`<ChatPanel>`/`<Transcript>`/`<MarkdownMessage>` (streamdown)/`<Composer>`/`<Working>`/`<ToolCall>`; IDE components `<Terminal>` (xterm)/`<FileExplorer>`/`<CodeEditor>` (CodeMirror); `<AskUser>`; **`useWebContainerPreview({ wc })`** (boot a dev server → live preview URL for an iframe); **`create-anyclaude-app`** (`npm create anyclaude-app@latest` — scaffolds the `bolt` in-browser AI IDE template).
- [Deploy](https://anyclaude-docs.puter.site/deploy.html): Browser (no backend); serverless functions with the "survivor" (`maxDurationMs` pause → persist to a SessionStore → `resume`+`continueRun`) for free-tier time caps (Vercel 300s / Appwrite 30s / Netlify 10s / Cloudflare CPU / Lambda 15m); sandbox-as-runtime (no limit); server-brain/browser-hands clientTools; **drop-in Claude Code router** (`anyclaude-sdk/anthropic-endpoint`: `anthropicToChat`/`anthropicSSE`/`streamResultToAnthropicMessage` — run Claude Code against any OpenAI-compatible model with tool-dialect recovery; example `claude-code-router`).

## Key APIs

- `query(options)` → `AsyncGenerator<SDKMessage>` with `.interrupt()`. Required options: `prompt`, `workspace`, `llm`.
- LLM clients: `createOpenAIClient({ baseUrl, model, apiKey })` (also Anthropic/Responses variants).
- Workspaces: `LocalSandbox`, `WebContainerWorkspace`, `E2BSandbox`, `MemoryFileSystem` + `composeWorkspace`.
- Custom tools: `defineTool({ name, description, parameters, run })` → `query({ extraTools })`.
- Interject mid-run: `MessageQueue` → `query({ messageQueue })` (one per turn boundary).
- Multi-agent: `query({ team: true, mailbox, board })`; push delivery to a running worker via `mailbox.send(from, 'worker:<taskId>', text)`; cross-worker via `new BroadcastChannelMailbox({ channelName, origin })` or `await BroadcastChannelMailbox.crossTab({ channelName, origin })`.
- Survivor: `query({ maxDurationMs })` pauses + `query({ resume, continueRun })` continues; SessionStore adapters: `SessionStore` (IndexedDB), `MemorySessionStore`, `KVSessionStore`, `RedisSessionStore`, `PostgresSessionStore`, `SupabaseSessionStore`.
- Interactive: `query({ onAskUser })` enables the `ask_user_question` tool. Client-side execution: `query({ clientTools: ['bash'] })` pauses with `client_tool_request`; resume with `query({ resume, continueRun, clientToolResults })`.
- React: `anyclaude-react` — `useAgent()`, `<AgentChat>`, `<ChatPanel>`, `<Transcript>`, `<MarkdownMessage>` (streamdown), `<Composer>`, `<Working>`, `<ToolCall>`, IDE `<Terminal>`/`<FileExplorer>`/`<CodeEditor>`, `<AskUser>`; `createAgentClient`/`createEndpointClient` auto-stitch `paused` continuations.

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/pipilot-dev/anyclaude-sdk)
- [npm: anyclaude-sdk](https://www.npmjs.com/package/anyclaude-sdk)
